sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31823" key="e)kdaneistiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκδᾰν-ειστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n31823.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">relating to loans,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔγγραφα</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">311</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
